overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban RPG (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character exploring a covered plaza beneath an overpass, entering a convenience shop, interacting with a food vendor, and approaching a Trauma Team medical hover vehicle in an open plaza. The environment features modern concrete architecture, outdoor seating with red plastic chairs, and futuristic elements like floating vehicles and augmented reality UI elements.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the shop entrance and stepping inside the convenience store

massive concrete highway overpass creating covered plaza area
large vertical digital billboard showing fashion advertisement on concrete pillar
large grey concrete tiles covering the pedestrian plaza

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a small convenience kiosk situated under a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic urban plaza. A woman stands near the entrance as the player walks toward and enters the octagonal glass-walled shop.

agents.ego_description: looking around the shop interior, examining shelves stocked with various goods

entered.detail: curved red shelving units stocked with drinks and packaged goods
service counter with cash register and display screens
metal wire racks holding magazines and small items

segments.scene_description: Inside the compact convenience store, the player surveys red curved shelves stocked with merchandise and a service counter. The space is brightly lit with fluorescent lighting, with glass doors visible leading back to the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining plaza with food vendors

events.description: exits the shop back into the covered plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza past outdoor seating areas with red plastic furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: numerous red plastic chairs arranged around white tables in the dining area
modern glass-walled food service building with plants on the roof
massive square concrete pillars supporting the overpass above

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shop, the player moves through a spacious covered plaza filled with red plastic outdoor furniture arranged for dining. The area sits beneath a massive concrete overpass with support pillars, featuring a modern glass food kiosk building on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: food service counter with outdoor bar seating

events.description: approaches food vendor and dialogue interaction options appear on screen

agents.ego_description: walking up to the food service counter and engaging with the vendor behind the bar

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the counter wearing a purple and green jacket

entered.detail: long stainless steel counter with yellow LED light strip and bar stools
twin screens displaying red menu graphics above the counter
large white planters with tropical plants dividing the seating areas

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a modern food service counter with stainless steel surfaces and digital menu screens. A vendor stands behind the bar as the player moves close enough to trigger dialogue interaction options, with tropical plants in white planters visible in the seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with seated groups

events.description: turns left to approach a group of three people seated at a table

agents.ego_description: walking back through the seating area and approaching a group of three people sitting at a table

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting at a white table with red chairs, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: cluster of tables where people are gathered and sitting
tall pillar with digital fashion advertisement showing a muscular man

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the food counter, the player walks through the dining area toward a group of three people seated at a table. A large digital advertisement billboard on a concrete pillar becomes prominent on the left as the player navigates between the red plastic chairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with emergency medical vehicle

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into open plaza with direct sunlight
approaches hovering Trauma Team vehicle with armed personnel surrounding it

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass toward a futuristic hovering medical vehicle and armed guards

notable_agents.action: armed medical personnel in green armor standing guard around the hover vehicle

entered.detail: large white and red futuristic hovering vehicle with thrusters emitting blue glow
high-rise apartment buildings with balconies visible in the distance
tropical palm trees lining the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into a bright open plaza where a Trauma Team hover vehicle floats above the ground, surrounded by armed medical personnel in green armor. Tall residential towers and palm trees rise in the background as the player approaches the emergency scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered depths of a concrete urban underpass into a bright, open city plaza. It begins with the camera approaching and entering a small, octagonal glass convenience kiosk, where the dim light of the overpass gives way to the bright fluorescent glow of stocked red shelves. As the camera exits the shop, the scene expands into a spacious covered dining area filled with red plastic furniture and stainless steel food counters, passing by tropical plants and a large digital billboard on a concrete pillar. The movement then carries the viewer past seated patrons and toward the edge of the structure, where the oppressive concrete ceiling finally opens up to a sunlit square. The sequence concludes as the camera emerges into the open air, approaching a floating Trauma Team hover vehicle and armed medical personnel set against a backdrop of towering residential skyscrapers and palm trees.
